headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Camden Prop Trust, Raises Price Target to $123
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Lewis   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $118 to $123.
